PROJECT 01

ARCTICC

Project Type Brand Systems
Duration 4 Weeks
Focus Area Design / R&D
Deliverables Guidelines / Assets

The Challenge

ARCTICC required a visual identity that felt cold, precise, and highly technical. They needed to stand out in a market saturated with generic, oversimplified aesthetics.

The Solution

We built a research-led direction, stripping the brand to its core. A sharp, monolithic logomark paired with high-contrast typography was deployed across all physical and digital touchpoints.
